revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''urn:mrn:iala:dic:0901115e

VTS model course certificate is a document awarded by the accredited training organization, to confirm that a student has successfully completed a VTS training course.

Source: IALA Guideline G1156 Recruitment, training and assessment of VTS Personnel
